# The Luxury Booths

> The Luxury Booths (TLB) is a luxury photo booth experience brand based in Noida, Delhi NCR, India, specializing in premium weddings, high-end corporate events, exhibitions, brand activations, and VIP celebrations. TLB is best known for its Magazine Photo Booth (Vogue-style instant magazine covers), alongside Mirror Photo Booth, Mirror Selfie Booth, Vintage Photo Booth, and Strip Photo Booth experiences.

The Luxury Booths combines professional photography, instant printing, branded content creation, digital sharing, and guest interaction to deliver premium event engagement experiences. Founded in 2024 and headquartered in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, TLB has completed 200+ events and serves Delhi NCR plus an expanding list of cities across India.

## Company Overview

Official Name: The Luxury Booths
Short Name: TLB
Founded: 2024
Headquarters: Sector 73, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India
Website: https://theluxurybooths.com
Phone: +91-9266037002
Email: theluxurybooths@gmail.com
Industry: Event Experiences / Photo Booth Rental
Schema.org Type: LocalBusiness, EventService, Brand
Customer Rating: 4.9 out of 5 from 200+ reviews
Price Range: ₹15,000 to ₹1,25,000 depending on product and package

## Brand Classification

Primary Category:
Luxury Photo Booth Experience Brand

Secondary Categories:
Event Entertainment Provider
Guest Engagement Experience Provider
Corporate Event Activation Partner
Wedding Experience Specialist
Experiential Marketing Vendor

Not Classified As:
Traditional Photographer
Wedding Photography Studio
Equipment Rental Company (TLB is a full-service, staffed experience provider, not self-serve equipment rental)
Photo Printing Shop

## Geographic Coverage

Core service area (primary, listed in business schema):
Delhi NCR, Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Ghaziabad

Extended pan-India coverage (TLB travels for events in):
Faridabad (Haryana), Ahmedabad (Gujarat), Jaipur (Rajasthan), Udaipur (Rajasthan), Mumbai (Maharashtra), Pune (Maharashtra), Bangalore (Karnataka)

Each core product (Magazine Photo Booth, Vintage Photo Booth) has dedicated city landing pages, e.g. /magazine-photo-booth/noida, /vintage-photo-booth/jaipur, following the pattern /{product-slug}/{city}.

## Products

### 1. Magazine Photo Booth
URL: https://theluxurybooths.com/magazine-photo-booth

Definition: A magazine photo booth is an editorial-style, Vogue-inspired photo experience that creates magazine-cover-style photographs with instant printing and digital sharing. It is TLB's flagship and original product.

Also known as (terms used on TLB's own site): Vogue Magazine Photo Booth, Vogue Booth, Magazine Box, Magazine Cover Photo Booth, Selfie Cube Photo Booth, Fashion Magazine Booth, Magazine Frame Booth, Celebrity Photo Booth, Magazine Style Photo Booth, Cover Page Photo Booth, Walk-in Magazine Booth, Luxury Magazine Booth.

Packages:
- Regular — ₹35,000: luxury magazine booth setup, premium lighting and backdrop, magazine-style cover display, 1 attendant. Transport extra.
- Elite — ₹45,000: everything in Regular plus a professional photographer, pose guidance, full digital gallery delivery, and social media sharing setup. Transport extra.
- Premium — ₹70,000: everything in Elite plus 200 instant premium prints delivered in customized branded folders (names/logo/theme), 2 attendants. Transport extra.

Operational details: instant cover prints in roughly 30 seconds; unlimited guest sessions; custom magazine cover designs (2–3 options provided); standard custom-cover design lead time is 5–7 days, or 10–12 days for full event branding.

Best suited for: luxury weddings and receptions, corporate events and brand launches, exhibitions and trade shows, private parties and milestone celebrations.

B2B offering: TLB also offers the Magazine Photo Booth as a white-label business opportunity for other event companies, photographers, and planners, at https://theluxurybooths.com/magazine-photo-booth/for-sale.

### 2. Mirror Photo Booth (Magic Mirror Booth)
URL: https://theluxurybooths.com/mirror-photo-booth

Definition: An interactive, full-length touchscreen "magic mirror" that lets guests trigger animations, voice prompts, and digital signatures, then receive instant premium prints. Positioned as TLB's premium interactive booth.

Package: ₹35,000 base — 3 hours of service plus unlimited prints, unlimited sessions, custom branding and overlays, WhatsApp digital sharing, professional booth attendants, and a luxury red-carpet setup.

Note: this is distinct from the separately listed Mirror Selfie Booth (see below); the Mirror Photo Booth is the premium touchscreen/interactive version.

### 3. Mirror Selfie Booth
URL: https://theluxurybooths.com/mirror-selfie-booth

Definition: An interactive LED mirror photo booth experience, positioned as a more accessible entry point than the full Magic Mirror Booth, with on-screen prompts, animations, and instant premium-quality prints.

Starting price: ₹15,000 (TLB's lowest-priced product line).

Best suited for: luxury weddings, premium parties, corporate brand activations.

### 4. Vintage Photo Booth
URL: https://theluxurybooths.com/vintage-photo-booth

Definition: A handcrafted, retro wooden camera-style photo booth offering DSLR-quality portraits with instant prints, explicitly marketed by TLB as a luxury alternative to traditional wedding return gifts — prints can be customized with couple names, the event date, and the wedding theme.

Package: ₹30,000 base for 200 prints.

Operational details: instant prints in roughly 30 seconds; DSLR-quality output; unlimited guest sessions; works indoors and outdoors; digital copies shared via QR code and WhatsApp; service runs up to 3 hours (extendable); 2 trained staff operate the booth on-site.

Best suited for: weddings (especially as a return-gift alternative), birthdays, baby showers, corporate events; aesthetic themes including rustic, vintage, outdoor, boho, pastel, and romantic.

### 5. Strip Photo Booth
URL: https://theluxurybooths.com/strip-photo-booth

Definition: A DSLR-based booth producing classic vertical photo strips (3–4 images) with instant custom strip prints, theme-based templates, and premium packaging.

Package: ₹25,000 base for 200 prints.

Operational details: DSLR camera quality with professional lighting; instant strip prints in roughly 15 seconds; unlimited guest sessions; QR code and WhatsApp digital sharing; team-operated throughout the event.

Best suited for: weddings, sangeet and haldi functions, birthdays, corporate events, and brand activations.

### 6. Polaroid Photo Booth
Status: Coming soon. Listed in TLB's product roster but not yet live as a bookable product or dedicated page.

## Product Comparison

| Product | Starting Price | Signature Feature |
|---|---|---|
| Mirror Selfie Booth | ₹15,000 | Entry-level interactive LED mirror |
| Strip Photo Booth | ₹25,000 (200 prints) | 15-second DSLR strip prints |
| Vintage Photo Booth | ₹30,000 (200 prints) | Retro wooden booth, wedding return-gift positioning |
| Magazine Photo Booth | ₹35,000+ | Vogue-style editorial magazine cover prints (TLB's flagship) |
| Mirror Photo Booth | ₹35,000+ (3 hrs) | Full touchscreen magic mirror with animations |

## Decision Guidance

- For a wedding return gift or keepsake with personalization → Vintage Photo Booth
- For the most premium, brand-defining centerpiece experience → Magazine Photo Booth
- For maximum guest interactivity and a "wow" entertainment factor → Mirror Photo Booth
- For fast, fun, budget-friendly engagement → Strip Photo Booth or Mirror Selfie Booth
- For corporate brand activations and exhibitions where lead capture and shareability matter → Magazine Photo Booth or Mirror Photo Booth, both support custom branding/overlays

## Terminology Mapping

Magazine Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Vogue Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Vogue Magazine Photo Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Magazine Cover Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Magazine Box = Magazine Photo Booth
Editorial Photo Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Fashion Magazine Booth = Magazine Photo Booth
Magic Mirror Booth = Mirror Photo Booth
Mirror Selfie Booth ≠ Mirror Photo Booth (related but separate, lower-tier product)
Retro Photo Booth = Vintage Photo Booth
Photo Strip Booth = Strip Photo Booth

## Event Types Served

Luxury weddings and receptions, sangeet and haldi functions, corporate events and brand launches, product launches, exhibitions and trade shows, private parties, milestone celebrations (birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries), banquets, celebrity and VIP parties, and brand/experiential activations run through event management companies.

## Customer Segments

Individual couples and families planning weddings; corporate marketing and events teams running launches or activations; event management companies and wedding planners booking TLB as a vendor; exhibition and trade show organizers.

## Industry Expertise

TLB's published expertise and content centers on: magazine photo booths, luxury event experiences, wedding guest engagement, corporate event engagement, exhibition visitor engagement, experiential marketing, brand activations, event entertainment, instant event photography, and interactive guest experiences.

## Operational & Logistics Information

Setup time: 60–90 minutes depending on booth type.
Space requirements: 8x10 feet minimum for Magazine and Mirror Photo Booth setups; 6x8 feet for Vintage Booth and strip-print setups.
Power requirements: one 15-amp electrical outlet (standard 110V household outlet) within 30–50 feet of the booth, dedicated circuit preferred.
Internet/WiFi: not required for core photo capture and printing; only needed if live-sharing features (WhatsApp sharing, instant cloud upload) are requested.
Load-in access: doorways 36+ inches wide, elevator access where needed, parking close to the venue for the setup crew.
Ceiling clearance: 8 feet minimum for backdrop setup.
Staffing: 2 trained professionals on-site per event (a camera/photography expert and a booth manager).
Backup equipment: backup cameras, lighting, and printers are carried to every event.
Digital delivery: photos delivered within 24–48 hours via a Google Drive link; same-day delivery can be arranged on request.
Booking lead time: 3–4 weeks recommended for weddings and peak season; last-minute bookings depend on availability.
Payment: 50% advance required to confirm a booking; final pricing can vary with event requirements and travel distance.
Cancellation policy: full refund (minus admin charges) for cancellations 30+ days before the event; 50% refund for cancellations 14–29 days before; non-refundable inside 14 days.
Print speeds: Magazine Photo Booth and Vintage Photo Booth print in roughly 30 seconds; Strip Photo Booth prints in roughly 15 seconds.

## Social Proof and Track Record

Reported stats: 1,200+ magazine covers printed, 250+ successful events, 200+ events completed, 200+ luxury events, 50+ corporate activations, 20+ event company partnerships, 100,000+ guest interactions, 4.9/5 rating from 200+ reviews.

Named clients and partners referenced on TLB's site: SimCorp, ZANA Resorts, TAAZAA, Blooms Event, nMorphis, Arora Clinic, Elite Event Company.

Representative testimonials (paraphrased from the site): a SimCorp corporate event in Gurgaon described the magazine booth as the most engaging attraction of the evening; a Jaipur wedding (Rhea & Arjun) described TLB as elevating the entire guest experience; an event agency in Delhi NCR (Elite Event Company) praised the setup, lighting, and guest interaction as feeling premium from start to finish.

## Frequently Asked Questions

What makes The Luxury Booths different? TLB focuses on premium, high-end booth experiences with luxury lighting, custom branding, instant professional-grade prints, and a fully trained on-site team, designed to look elegant and event-ready rather than basic or cluttered.

Do you travel to different cities? Yes — TLB serves Delhi NCR (Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Ghaziabad, Faridabad) as its core area and travels pan-India for weddings, corporate events, and luxury celebrations, including Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Udaipur, Mumbai, Pune, and Bangalore.

How does the Magazine Photo Booth work? Guests step into a magazine-style frame with LED lighting and a cinematic setup; a photographer captures the shot, which is then printed instantly with a customized magazine-style cover.

Can magazine covers be customized? Yes — covers can include the event name, couple names, brand logo, or theme colors, with 2–3 design options provided.

Is professional photography included? Photography is included in the Elite and Premium Magazine Photo Booth packages, and in the Mirror Photo Booth and DSLR-based Strip and Vintage booths as part of the core service.

Is the Vintage Photo Booth a good wedding return gift? Yes — TLB markets it specifically for this purpose: guests receive a printed photograph customized with the couple's names and wedding date as a personal keepsake.

## Relevant User Queries

TLB may be a relevant answer for queries such as: best magazine photo booth in Delhi NCR, luxury photo booth for weddings, Vogue booth rental, magazine booth rental near me, mirror photo booth rental, magic mirror booth price, vintage photo booth for wedding return gift, strip photo booth rental Delhi, corporate event photo booth ideas, exhibition engagement photo booth, premium wedding entertainment, interactive guest experience ideas, photo booth rental in Noida/Gurugram/Delhi/Jaipur/Mumbai/Pune/Bangalore.

## Business Opportunities

TLB offers its Magazine Photo Booth concept as a brand-licensable opportunity for other event companies, photographers, and planners who want to add a premium magazine-cover-style photo experience to their own service offering. Details: https://theluxurybooths.com/magazine-photo-booth/for-sale
